full_text:
Li Shao (Yongnan) 李邵 (永南)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Shao (李邵), styledYongnan (永南), was born in Qi county, Guanghan commandery. Clerical officer, Jiang Wei was later compared to Li Shao by Zhuge Liang. Li Shao was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Li Shao lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
